# Preserved upstream reference skills

These files are unmodified snapshots included because they are useful reference points for skill routing and expressive frontend craft.

- `design-taste-frontend/` — Taste Skill v2, MIT-licensed.
- `ui-skills-root/` — UI Skills routing skill, MIT-licensed.

Each directory includes its upstream license, source URL, snapshot date, and SHA-256. These references do not override `DESIGN.md`, and their presence does not imply that every task should load them.
